description: Register an alternative under a proposed decision point (BL-70): a lightweight Artifact pointer that names where the alternative's design export lives (branch-by-file), GOVERNED_BY the Decision and CONTRADICTS its siblings. Refuses unless the Decision is `proposed` — you fork an open choice, not a settled one. Compare the registered alternatives with analyze_alternatives, then collapse_decision to choose.

artifact_id.description: Id for the alternative pointer (an Artifact), e.g. `alt:laser`.

decision_id.description: The proposed Decision this alternative is a fork of.

location.description: Where the alternative's design export lives (branch-by-file).

name: register_alternative
